sentences.arabic: أَكَلَتْ سَلْمَى خُضَرَوَاتٍ طَازَجَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Salma je jela svježe povrće svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: Salma ate fresh vegetables every day.

sentences.translation: Popila je sok od naranče ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: She drank orange juice in the morning.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لِأُمِّهَا إِنَّ الطَّعَامَ الصِّحِّيَّ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Rekla je svojoj majci da je zdrava hrana veoma važna.
sentences.translationEn: She told her mother that healthy food is very important.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَأْكُلُ سَلْمَى كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْحَلْوَى.
sentences.translationEn: Salma does not eat a lot of sweets.

sentences.translation: Njeno tijelo je snažno i njeno zdravlje je dobro.
sentences.translationEn: Her body is strong and her health is good.
